positive: An aesthetically minimalist design featuring a stylized celestial map and geometric animal silhouettes. The main subject is a detailed constellation of glowing, interconnected stars forming the shape of a leaping stag and a crescent moon. Surrounding the stag and moon are abstract floral elements (mandala style) and subtle planetary orbits depicted with fine, clean line art. The overall style is ethereal, vintage scientific illustration mixed with modern abstract art. Use limited color palette: deep midnight blue, gold foil accents, and pale dusty lavender. The composition must be centralized, designed for high contrast print on a dark background, ensuring clear, non-overlapping negative space and strong silhouettes. Highly detailed, vector graphic look, perfect for screen printing.
negative: low contrast, grainy, blurry, text, lettering, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, bokeh, 3d render, realism
